title: World Cup Day 1 What to Watch: Mexico gets the tournament started as Group A begins play
original_text:
World Cup Day 1 What to Watch: Mexico gets the tournament started as Group A begins play
Most national teams have announced their World Cup rosters for the World Cup this summer, but one of the last teams to have yet to make it official is one of the host nations, Mexico.
Something unique about the Mexican national team this year is that head coach Javier Aguirre decided to call up multiple players who play in Liga MX in early May to begin training a month before the World Cup starts.
Advertisement
The decision was questioned by many in Mexico, as some players selected for the early camp had to leave their clubs, who were playing in the Liga MX Liguilla (playoffs).
Players of Mexico listen to their Head Coach Javier Aguirre (C) during a training session at CAR on May 20, 2026 in Mexico City, Mexico. (Photo by Agustin Cuevas/Getty Images)Photo by Agustin Cuevas/Getty Images
Over the past few weeks, the Mexican Football Federation (FMF) has announced more players joining the camp, specifically players who play in Europe.
With over 26 players now, Aguirre will finally announce the 26-man Mexico World Cup roster following the friendly match against Australia.
Advertisement
When Will The Mexico World Cup Squad Be Announced?
The official Mexico World Cup squad announcement will be made on May 31, 2026, a day after Mexico vs Australia.
Fox Sports Mexico reports that the FMF is preparing a special video and an official statement to announce the 26 players who are included in the Mexico World Cup squad.
There are rumors in Mexico suggesting that Javier Aguirre will not have a press conference after the roster is announced, but he is expected to receive questions from the players he selected before the friendly match against Serbia next Thursday.
Advertisement
There is yet to be an official time for the announcement, but it could range between the morning and the afternoon.
This story was originally published by Athlon Sports on May 30, 2026, where it first appeared in the Soccer section. Add Athlon Sports as a Preferred Source by clicking here.
